summary: Excellent audience recording captured with a Nakamichi 700 mkII, praised as virtually indistinguishable from a board mix.
review: All three reviewers rave about the sonic fidelity of this tape, noting the high‑end Nakamichi deck and an up‑front mic placement that makes the audience source sound almost like a soundboard, especially through the second set. No comments on musical performance are given, so the rating hinges on the outstanding recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent, detailed reviews rate the tape 4‑5 stars and highlight exceptional audio clarity; with no negative feedback on performance, the overall rating leans strongly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with a Nakamichi 700 mkII deck; up‑front mic captures clear, detailed sound that is hard to distinguish from a board mix until the drums come in. Reviewers call it 'perfect' and 'amazing quality'.
